CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Google_Tracker_Link__c )=true,'None','')& IF(CONTAINS( Google_Tracker_Link__c , 'google') =true,'Google','')& IF(CONTAINS( Google_Tracker_Link__c , 'sharepoint') =true,'Sharepoint','')& IF(CONTAINS( Google_Tracker_Link__c , 'sites.com') =true,'Visualforce','')
CustomField.label: Tracker Type
